عند: with; at; in the sight of
لعل: so that perhaps; that you may
اتقي: he was mindful (of Allah); feared Allah
كذب: he denied; called it a lie
صلي الله عليه وسلم: may Allah bless him & grant him peace
يجب ان: I must; it is necessary that
قد قامت الصلاة: the prayer has begun (from the iqama)
ان الحمد لله: indeed all praise is for Allah (khutbah opener)
قال رسول الله: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said
اقول قولي هذا: I say these words of mine… (closing)
رحمكم الله: may Allah have mercy on you
الصمد: the the Self-Sufficient One on whom all depend
يولد: he (is) — passive root-letter "w" of w-l-d (lengthened to ū) born / begotten
يكن: he / it (3rd-person masculine prefix) be / exist (from kāna)
كفوا: equal / comparable / a match indefinite accusative ending ("a / an," object-case)
والعصر: by (an oath: 'I swear by…') the time / the passing age (late afternoon)
الانسن: the human being, mankind accusative ending
الذين ء: the (relative marker; its lām is doubled) those who (masc. plural)
الصلحت: the righteous / good (deeds) sound feminine plural ending
وتواصوا: and mutually advised / urged one another they (masc. plural)
بالحق: with / to / regarding the truth / what is right
وتواصوا بالصبر: and mutually advised / urged one another they (masc. plural) to / with the patience / steadfast endurance
اعطينك: gave / granted (Form IV verb stem) we (the doers) you (singular, addressed to the Prophet)
فصل: so / therefore (connecting this to what came before) pray! (perform the ritual prayer)
لربك: to / for (the sake of) Lord, Master, Sustainer your (one male)
شانئك: the one who hates / detractor you (your)
الابتر: the cut off / severed (without lineage or trace)
اله: god / deity (the one worthy of worship) of (genitive ending linking to the next word)
الخناس: the one who repeatedly withdraws/slinks away genitive ending
يوسوس: he / it (present-tense "he does" marker) whisper, insinuate
صدور: chests / breasts (plural) of (genitive ending, linking to the next word)
الفلق: the daybreak, the cleaving-open of dawn
النفثت: the women who blow much/repeatedly (of) — genitive ending
انزلنه: sent down / caused to descend (Form IV) we (subject: Allah, majestic plural) it / him (object: the Qur'an)
القدر: the (definite article) power / decree / measuring-out / high worth
ادريك: made (someone) know / caused to realize you (single male)
تنزل: they descend repeatedly / come down in waves
فيها: in / during it (referring to the Night, feminine)
ربهم: Lord, Master, Sustainer their (referring to the angels)
سلم: peace, safety, soundness a / some (indefinite nominative marker)
مطلع: place/time of rising or emergence of (genitive case ending)
يايها: O! (call to get attention) you/one (the word the call lands on) (particle of alerting; sharpens the call)
الكفرون: the ones who reject faith / cover up the truth (plural ending: more than two males)
تعبدون: you (do) worship / serve (masculine plural) you all
عبدون: worshipper / one who worships (masculine plural ending)
عابد: worshipper / one who worships a (indefinite marker)
ما اعبد: that which / (my) manner of I worship (indicative-mood ending)
لكم: for / belonging to you (plural, men addressed)
دينكم: religion / way of life / requital (subject-marking ending) your (plural, men addressed)
والفتح: and the victory / opening, conquest (subject marker)
يدخلون: they (he-type, marks present tense) enter, go in they (masculine plural)
افواجا: in crowds, in throngs, in troops (groups of people)
فسبح: so / then (in response to what came before) glorify! / declare (Him) free of all imperfection
بحمد: with / by means of the praise (of)
ربك: Lord / Master and Sustainer your (one male)
واستغفره: and seek forgiveness! / ask for pardon Him
توابا: ever-accepting of repentance / oft-relenting (accusative ending, completing "He has ever been ___")
تبت: to perish, be ruined, come to nothing feminine-singular subject ending (agreeing with 'hands')
لهب: flame, blaze the '-in' ending: genitive + indefinite (no 'the')
اغني: availed / warded off (Form IV) he/it (3rd-person masc. past ending)
عنه: from / on behalf of him (attached pronoun)
سيصلي: shall / will soon (future marker) he (3rd-person masculine prefix) roast / be burned by fire
لايلف: for / because of (a preposition giving the reason or purpose) making accustomed, habituation, granting settled familiari
قريش: Quraysh, the tribe of Makkah (the final '-in' is the genitive case ending with nunation, marking it as the possessor of
الفهم: making accustomed / habitual familiarity (the -i ending: 'of', genitive linking vowel) their (them)
رحلة: a journey / caravan trip (feminine noun stem; the ة is pronounced -t- here) (the -a ending on the ة: object marker)
فليعبدوا: so / then (a connector drawing a conclusion) let / must (command particle) they worship (silent spelling alif after the
وءامنهم: and he made safe / gave security them
تر: 'you' (the doer; masculine singular) the verb stem 'see'; its middle root-letter hamza (ء) and its final weak root-lette
يجعل: 'he' — the prefix marking a 3rd-person masculine singular subject 'make / place / render / cause to be'
كيدهم: 'plot, scheme, cunning stratagem' 'their' — attached pronoun for 'them' (masculine plural)
تضليل: 'causing to go astray / leading into ruin and loss' the '-in' ending: genitive case + nunation (an unspecified 'a state
ترميهم: she / it (feminine subject prefix — referring back to the flock of birds, ṭayr, treated as feminine) throws / pelts / hu
فجعلهم: and so / then (marks the result or sequence of events) He made / turned (into) them (object)
كعصف: like / as chaff, dry straw, crop husks
ماكول: eaten, devoured (base of the passive participle) final root letter + indefinite genitive ending (-in)
القيوم: the self-subsisting sustainer definite nominative ending (-u)
تاخذه: she / it (does) take / seize indicative ending (-u) him
باذنه: with / by permission / leave genitive ending His
يحيطون: they (do) encompass / encircle masculine plural, indicative (-ūna)
بشيء: with / by means of a thing / something
والارض: and the earth / land definite accusative ending (-a)
يوده: he / it (does) weary / burden indicative ending (-u) him
حفظهما: guarding / preserving nominative ending (-u) the two of them / both of them
العلي: the high / exalted definite nominative ending (-u)
العظيم: the great / immense definite nominative ending (-u)
انا بخير، الحمد لله: I'm well, praise be to Allah
ابحث عن الفندق: I am looking for the hotel
هل عندك مقاس اكبر؟: do you have a bigger size?
شبعت، الحمد لله: I'm full, praise be to Allah
كيف اقول هذا بالعربية؟: how do I say this in Arabic?
